text: Bitcoin is holding steady near $64K while Ethereum has slipped slightly, signaling cautious positioning among major asset holders despite modest daily moves. The Fear & Greed index at 23 reflects extreme fear, though its recent uptick suggests some early stabilization after a deeper sell-off. Bitcoin's dominance at 56.2% and subdued $50B daily volume point to a market in risk-off mode, with traders consolidating rather than committing fresh capital.
